title: Tampa Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Tampa, with a Z-Score of +4.20. Temperatures are significantly above average, posing a critical threat.
body:
The current heat wave in Tampa has reached a critical level, with a Score of 10.0/10. 
 The high temperatures are causing an increase in Cooling Degree Days (CDD), which currently stands at 13.7 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 53%, and wind speed is at 16.7 km/h, exacerbating the heat wave's impact.
conclusion: Implement emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
